mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( username, email, display_name, avatar_url, weight_kg, weight_unit, height_cm, height_unit, birth_date, activity_level, timezone ) VALUES ( #{username}, #{email}, #{displayName}, #{avatarUrl}, #{weightKg}, COALESCE(#{weightUnit}, 'kg'), #{heightCm}, COALESCE(#{heightUnit}, 'cm'), #{birthDate}, #{activityLevel}, COALESCE(#{timezone}, 'Asia/Taipei') )
mapper.select: SELECT id, username, email, display_name, avatar_url, weight_kg, weight_unit, height_cm, height_unit, birth_date, activity_level, timezone, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM users WHERE is_deleted = false

SELECT id, username, email, display_name, avatar_url, weight_kg, weight_unit, height_cm, height_unit, birth_date, activity_level, timezone, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM users WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = false
